title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 17–20, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I will never forgive anyone who messes up this hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I got this hat ages ago from a friend

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: thought this guy was someone who'd never get agi-tated at 'any- thing,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But he's so pissed off now....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the hat that precious to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If it's that preci- outs to you then why don't you pro- text it properly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Kuhahahahahahaha what sort of treasure is this rag-like-hat!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is my favorite hat, you know

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: When you become a great pirate in the future,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you'll return that hat to me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the hat I swore myself to with shanks!!!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
